description: A normal English booking call with a proper greeting and human handoff fires no transcript checks.

transcript_object.content: Thanks for calling Acme Wellness, this is Ava. How can I help you today?
Hi, I'd like to book a signature facial.
Wonderful — our Signature Facial is a 60-minute treatment with a licensed esthetician. Would you like a time this week?
Let me have Jordan, our patient coordinator, confirm an exact slot. May I take your name and best callback number?
Thank you, Taylor. Jordan will reach out shortly to lock in Friday afternoon. Anything else I can help with?
Thanks so much for calling Acme Wellness — take care and we'll see you soon!
